title: Chinese Buddhist: Bi Yan Lu (Blue Cliff Record) (1)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Bi Yan Lu (Blue Cliff Record)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Bi Yan Lu (Blue Cliff Record)

translation.text: From Bi Yan Lu (Blue Cliff Record): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
